expertAssessments.rationale: Core routes, dashboard modal auto-focus, AI off-domain fallback, and production API health/version were validated together after deploy.
The off-domain weather query preserved disclaimer behavior while removing the stale 2023 absolute date regression on production v8.11.25.
The repeated production chunk init TypeError no longer reproduced across the verified core routes on deployment dpl_643GY6xfecoQXhCqzRUnE4TNajmF.
Deployment dpl_643GY6xfecoQXhCqzRUnE4TNajmF stayed READY and /api/health + /api/version returned healthy production metadata for v8.11.25.

usageChecks.summary: vercel usage --format json --non-interactive succeeded after production broad rerun; no unexpected usage spike observed.

completedImprovements.title: Clear repeated production chunk init console error across core routes
completedImprovements.note: v8.11.25 broad rerun confirmed landing/privacy/login/dashboard/ai-assistant no longer emit the repeated chunk init TypeError.

completedImprovements.title: Stop stale absolute dates in off-domain relative-date answers
completedImprovements.note: v8.11.25 weather query on 2026-04-21 no longer leaked 2023 absolute dates and instead used current KST date context with disclaimer.

notes: This rerun supersedes QA-20260421-0323 for the two blocking regressions: the production Sentry chunk init error is gone and the off-domain relative-date grounding issue is fixed.

The 404 exploratory route emits the expected browser resource-load 404 console entry, but the prior blocker was the repeated _next chunk init TypeError across normal routes and that no longer reproduced.
The weather answer kept the product disclaimer and now referenced the current 2026-04-21 KST date context instead of leaking a stale 2023 absolute date.
